character.name:
Giant spider matriarch boss, isometric pixel art, gothic horror. 
Large arachnid creature with 4 visible thick black legs and a bloated 
abdomen with pulsing venom sacs. Upper torso is humanoid female, pale 
bone-white, with 5 glowing red-orange eyes arranged on the face. 
Mandibles visible near the mouth. Body color deep black #0a0510 with 
dark purple accents #3a1040. Venom sacs on abdomen glow sickly green. 
Massive imposing silhouette. Crisp pixel art, dark background, 
transparent if possible.
